description: This pipeline visualizes image data by first processing tracks and then using the output to visualize spots, allowing for a comprehensive analysis of the data based on annotations.

7802c79b-e08f-416d-a1ff-d83f7d1ebb0d.name: trackmate-visualize-spots
7802c79b-e08f-416d-a1ff-d83f7d1ebb0d.description:
Visualizes spots

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6bd2b6b6-e3a9-49cb-a9b9-787cb8b4f6bb.name: trackmate-visualize-tracks
6bd2b6b6-e3a9-49cb-a9b9-787cb8b4f6bb.description:
Visualizes tracks

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
